contents.text: The firecracker sets enemies ablaze and capitalizes on it with their blistering speed.
Full fire resistance. Eliminations light your sparkler back on fire and increase the damage of the next sparkler projectile.

tooltip.text:
Cost - 200 Siege Bucks
A 4-pack of throwable snaps that pop when they hit a surface.
The pop deals 4 damage and ignites all victims in an 8 block radius.
Can have a maximum of 12 at once.

Cost - 600 Siege Bucks
Don't ask for the recipe.
Right click to splash the napalm in front of you.
The napalm debuffs burning enemies, reducing their armor points by 4 and slowing them by 15% for 5s.
Can be used every 15s.

Cost - 550 Siege Bucks
A sturdy pair of boots that increases your speed when near a burning enemy.
Also has slightly better armor and protection than base kit boots.

Cost - 650 Siege Bucks
Right click to consume some of your health to increase your speed by 30% and attack damage by +1.
The effects are increased to 40% movement speed and +2 damage if you are on fire.
Lasts 5s. Can be used every 24s.

Cost - 350 Siege Bucks
A 2 pack of bombs that can be thrown to place a modified smoke cloud.
The smoke blinds enemies and additionally deals a small amount of damage.
Damage is doubled against burning enemies and slows them by 8%.
Can have a maximum of 4 at once.

Cost - 650 Siege Bucks
An improved helmet that gives increased defense.
Also automatically removes blindness, poison, and wither debuffs from the wearer.

Cost - 2000 Siege Bucks
Increases the sparkler damage increase on elimination to +3.5.
Returns you to the main menu.
